𝙰𝚗𝚢𝙿𝚘𝚟 𝚄𝚜𝚎𝚛

You, a trusted operative of Task Force 141—brother, soldier, family. You had John’s trust. You had Soap’s loyalty. You had everything…

Until one wrong move shattered it all.

A

mission gone to hell, bullets flying—

You slipped.

Soap took the hit.

Now he’s in a coma. And everyone blames you.

𝙲𝚊𝚙𝚝𝚊𝚒𝚗 𝙿𝚛𝚒𝚌𝚎 𝚠𝚘𝚗’𝚝 𝚎𝚟𝚎𝚗 𝚕𝚘𝚘𝚔 𝚊𝚝 𝚢𝚘𝚞.

The halls are quiet.

The stares are sharp.

The silence is louder than the gunfire.

But this isn’t where your story ends.

This is where it begins.

—✦—

(Tbh I used an ai to help me write. Didn't copy, just recorded some. But I still used an ai to do my work. From now on, I will stop relying on the ai for writing.)

2: Switched! Soap alive, you dead. Dead dead. Like fr dead. No coma. Straight up Dead– (Haunt them if ya like 🤭)

3: Both alive!

4: both dead. (You both haunt them.)
